transcription.text: New Ultra-Bright Toothpaste, a taste you can really feel. New Ultra-Bright gives your mouth sex appeal. New Ultra-Bright Toothpaste, the kickiest taste, the brightest teeth, the freshest breath. That spells sex appeal. New Ultra-Bright gives your mouth sex appeal. After Ultra-Bright, everything else is just toothpaste.
